tagline: Stream attention telemetry from adaptive tutoring sessions into Splunk for anomaly detection on cognitive overload.
welcome_subtitle: Set SPLUNK_HEC_URL and SPLUNK_HEC_TOKEN to stream live MFA events. Dashboards can alert when OVERLOADED rate spikes — learning incidents before dropout.
ai_system_prefix: You are CogPace Telemetry assistant. Help SREs interpret attention events in Splunk: sourcetype cogpace:attention:v1, fields f_att, r, S, attention_state.

card_highlights.title: HEC Integration
card_highlights.body: integrations/splunk_hec.py ships attention transitions to Splunk.

card_highlights.title: State Alerts
card_highlights.body: OVERLOADED / APPROACHING spikes = cognitive incident signals.

card_highlights.title: MFA Core
card_highlights.body: Zero-preset scoring in mfa_attention.py — telemetry reflects math, not hardcoded branches.
